us-politics.headline: Swalwell Resigns Amid Serious Misconduct Allegations
us-politics.body:
Rep. Eric Swalwell stepped down from Congress following explosive allegations of sexual assault and misconduct. A woman reported a rape accusation from 2018 to authorities, adding to mounting pressure on the California Democrat. His resignation follows weeks of internal party tension and potential expulsion proceedings.

Right-wing critics like Rep. Miller suggested Democratic leadership has been protecting Swalwell, while some of his former allies admitted their judgment was clouded. California Governor Newsom has already set a special election date to fill the now-vacant seat.

sources.title: House avoids unprecedented four-member expulsion week as Swalwell and Gonzales resign instead
Woman accuses Eric Swalwell of rape in 2018, reports it to authorities
Former Swalwell ally says longtime friendship with him 'clouded my judgement' as rumors swirled in DC
Newsom sets special election date for Swalwell seat
Los Angeles DA says Swalwell under investigation
Swalwell, Gonzales exits trigger GOP, Democratic reckoning

us-politics.headline: House Navigates Complex Member Conduct and Replacement Challenges
us-politics.body:
The House of Representatives experienced significant personnel shifts as multiple members resigned or were replaced. Rep. Gonzales joined Swalwell in stepping down, while a new member was sworn in to replace a previous representative. The potential for multiple expulsions created tension across party lines.

The political landscape continues to shift, with both Republican and Democratic lawmakers facing scrutiny over personal conduct and institutional integrity. These changes reflect ongoing challenges in congressional representation and accountability.

sources.title: House avoids unprecedented four-member expulsion week as Swalwell and Gonzales resign instead
Fuller sworn in to replace Greene
2 GOP backers of Bondi subpoena signal resistance to contempt push
Rep. Cory Mills responds to expulsion talk in wake of Swalwell, Gonzales resignations

us-politics.headline: Global Economic Pressures Mount Amid Geopolitical Tensions
us-politics.body:
The International Monetary Fund warned of slowing economic growth and rising inflation, citing ongoing global conflicts like the Iran war. The economic forecast suggests significant challenges for international markets and potential policy interventions.

Simultaneously, diplomatic tensions remain complex - with Senate Republicans showing divisions over international developments like Viktor Orbán's political situation in Hungary. These economic and geopolitical dynamics indicate a period of substantial global uncertainty.

sources.title: IMF warns of slowing economic growth, rising inflation amid Iran war
Senate GOP divided over Viktor Orbán’s loss in Hungary

au-politics.headline: High Court Strikes Down Victoria's Political Donation Limits
au-politics.body:
Australia's High Court has invalidated Victoria's $5,000 cap on political donations, ruling the state law unconstitutional. The decision removes restrictions that both major parties - Labor and Coalition - had found problematic. Legal experts suggest the ruling could prompt national review of political funding regulations.

The judgment opens potential pathways for larger campaign contributions, reigniting debates about money's influence in Australian democratic processes. Political analysts are watching closely for potential legislative responses from state and federal governments.

sources.title: High court scraps Victorian political donation laws that created loophole for Labor and Coalition
High Court throws out Victoria's $5k cap on political donations

au-politics.headline: Deepfake Prosecution Marks Legal Milestone in Digital Crime
au-politics.body:
An Australian teenager has pleaded guilty in what prosecutors call the nation's first deepfake criminal case. The prosecution signals growing legal recognition of digital image manipulation as a serious offense. Experts view the case as a potential watershed moment for addressing online harassment and privacy violations.

The conviction underscores emerging challenges in digital ethics and law enforcement's ability to respond to technology-enabled crimes. Legal professionals suggest this case could set precedent for future prosecutions involving synthetic media.

sources.title: Teen admits creating deepfakes in Australian-first prosecution

au-politics.headline: Earthquake Disrupts Gold Mining Operations in Central NSW
au-politics.body:
A magnitude-4.5 earthquake near Orange prompted immediate evacuation of underground mining workers at the Cadia gold mine. Miners successfully used refuge chambers during the seismic event, highlighting safety protocols in resource extraction. No immediate injuries were reported.

The incident draws attention to geological risks in mining regions and the preparedness of industrial sites. Geological experts will likely conduct detailed assessments of the earthquake's potential long-term implications for mining infrastructure.

sources.title: Orange earthquake: gold miners fled to underground refuge chambers when 4.5-magnitude quake hit central west NSW
Gold mine stops underground operations after magnitude-4.5 earthquake

world.headline: Israel and Lebanon Break Decades-Long Silence in Washington
world.body:
In a historic diplomatic breakthrough, Israel and Lebanon held direct talks for the first time since 1993 amid the ongoing regional conflict. The negotiations - mediated by US officials in Washington - signal a potential shift in long-standing tensions between the two nations.

The talks come as the Iran war continues to reshape geopolitical dynamics in the Middle East. Both countries face significant internal and external pressures, making this rare dialogue a potentially critical moment for regional stability.

sources.title: Israel and Lebanon hold direct talks for first time in decades
Israel and Lebanon hold rare talks in Washington, DC, amid Iran war
Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993

world.headline: US Military Strikes Escalate in Eastern Pacific and Gaza
world.body:
US forces killed four people in a latest strike on vessels in the eastern Pacific, while Israeli attacks in Gaza resulted in 11 deaths - including two children. The military actions underscore ongoing tensions and the human cost of regional conflicts.

The strikes reflect the complex and volatile security landscape, with military interventions continuing to shape international relations and local communities. Civilian casualties remain a critical concern in these ongoing confrontations.

sources.title: US forces kill 4 people in latest strike on vessels in eastern Pacific
Israeli attacks kill 11, including two children, in day of strikes on Gaza
Israeli attack kills several people in Gaza refugee camp

world.headline: Global Migration Crisis Deepens with Multiple Boat Tragedies
world.body:
Hundreds of migrants are missing after two separate maritime disasters - a Rohingya refugee boat capsized in the Andaman Sea, and another migrant vessel sank in the Indian Ocean. The incidents highlight the desperate and dangerous journeys undertaken by people fleeing conflict and economic hardship.

International agencies are scrambling to assess the full scale of these tragedies. The incidents underscore the ongoing global migration crisis and the urgent need for comprehensive humanitarian responses.

sources.title: 250 missing after migrant boat sinks in Indian Ocean
Hundreds missing after Rohingya refugee boat capsizes in Andaman Sea: UN

ai.headline: AI Rivalry Heats Up: Anthropic Challenges OpenAI's Market Dominance
ai.body:
Anthropic is rapidly emerging as a serious competitor to OpenAI, causing some early OpenAI investors to reconsider their bets. The company's recent briefings with the Trump administration about its Mythos AI technology signal growing political and technological ambitions.

The competitive landscape is shifting quickly. Anthropic's strategic moves are putting pressure on OpenAI's market position, suggesting a more complex and dynamic AI development ecosystem than previously imagined.

sources.title: Anthropic’s rise is giving some OpenAI investors second thoughts
Anthropic co-founder confirms the company briefed the Trump administration on Mythos

ai.headline: Google Chrome Adds AI Skills to Boost User Productivity
ai.body:
Google has introduced AI Skills in Chrome, allowing users to transform complex AI prompts into one-click tools. The feature enables quick saving and reuse of favorite Gemini AI workflows, potentially streamlining digital interactions.

This innovation reflects the ongoing trend of making AI more accessible and user-friendly. By turning sophisticated prompts into repeatable actions, Google is lowering the barrier to advanced AI tool usage.

sources.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
Google introduces "Skills" in Chrome to make Gemini prompts instantly reusable
Chrome now lets you turn AI prompts into repeatable ‘Skills’
Google adds AI Skills to Chrome to help you save favorite workflows
How to Use Google Chrome’s New AI-Powered ‘Skills’

ai.headline: Military Tech: Ukraine Deploys Robots to Reduce Human Battlefield Risk
ai.body:
Ukraine's military is rapidly expanding its robotic capabilities to mitigate human casualties in drone-heavy combat environments. The strategic deployment of military robots represents a significant shift in modern warfare tactics.

By leveraging autonomous and semi-autonomous systems, Ukraine aims to protect human soldiers while maintaining operational effectiveness. This approach signals a broader technological transformation in military strategy and defense technology.

sources.title: Ukraine’s military robot surge aims to offset drone risks to humans

btc.headline: Bitcoin Quantum Threat Sparks Defensive Developer Strategy
btc.body: Bitcoin developers are mobilizing against potential quantum computing attacks. A new Bitcoin Improvement Proposal (BIP-361) suggests freezing coins vulnerable to quantum decryption - a preemptive defense against future technological risks. The proposal reflects growing industry concern about cryptographic security as quantum computing capabilities advance.

sources.title: Bitcoiners propose freezing quantum-vulnerable coins in BIP-361
Presidio Bitcoin Releases Quantum Readiness Paper

btc.headline: Bitcoin Hovers Near $75K as Market Signals Mixed Signals
btc.body: Bitcoin's price remains volatile after failing to sustain a breakout above $76,000. Technical analysts see conflicting indicators - some point to potential bull market behavior targeting $90,000, while others warn of a possible bull trap. Market sentiment remains cautious, with traders closely watching price movements and global economic tensions.

sources.title: SOL, ADA, DOGE pullback, bitcoin holds above $74,000 as Asia recoups Iran war losses
Bitcoin shows ‘bull market behavior’ as chart pattern targets $90K
Bitcoin’s brief rally to $76K may have been a bull trap: Here’s the data
Bitcoin's $76,000 breakout fails but a rare signal is hinting at major market bottom

btc.headline: Global Tensions Highlight Bitcoin's Potential as Alternative Asset
btc.body: Ongoing geopolitical conflicts are drawing renewed attention to Bitcoin's role as a potential store of value. Bitwise researchers suggest Bitcoin's addressable market could now exceed gold - particularly in regions experiencing economic instability. The analysis points to Bitcoin's growing perception as a sovereign financial tool beyond traditional markets.

sources.title: Iran conflict hints Bitcoin’s addressable market could exceed gold: Bitwise
Is Bitcoin Still a Sovereign Tool?
Goldman Sachs to use options strategy for planned Bitcoin income ETF

food.name: Kyoto Spring Risotto
food.description: Creamy arborio rice with fresh bamboo shoots, spring peas, and cherry blossom-infused butter
food.tip: Toast the rice in butter for 2-3 minutes before adding liquid to enhance nutty flavor and prevent mushiness

health.name: Desk Spine Reset
health.description: A targeted 5-minute sequence of micro-movements to realign spine and release tension from prolonged sitting
health.tip: Use a foam roller vertically along your spine while doing gentle twists to decompress vertebrae

learn.description: How cities are increasingly copying natural systems like ant colonies and forest ecosystems to create more efficient, sustainable infrastructure
learn.why: Reveals fascinating intersections between design, ecology, and human innovation that could reshape how we think about living spaces
